name: Root Vegetable Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 medium Red Potatoes - peeled and cubed
2 Hearts of Bibb Lettuce - leaves separated and rinsed
2 cups Fresh Spinach Leaves - stemmed and rinsed
Salt and white pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the leeks in half lengthwise, then crosswise into thin slices.
2. Place the leek slices in a colander and rinse under warm water to remove sand.
3. Drain and set aside.
4. In a large casserole, melt the butter over low heat.
5. Add the flour and cook, stirring constantly for one minute without browning.
6. Gradually add the chicken stock, whisking until well blended.
7. Add the reserved leeks, carrots, turnips, parsnips, and potatoes to the pot.
8. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer until vegetables are almost tender.
9. Add the lettuce leaves and spinach leaves; season with salt and pepper.
10. The lettuce should just wilt but remain crisp—avoid overcooking.
11. Before serving, stir in the heavy cream and heat the soup gently without boiling it.
12. Transfer to a large tureen, garnish with chives and parsley, and serve hot with thin slices of black bread.
